name: SymbolLibrary
summary: The SymbolLibrary class is for handling symbol libraries.

methods.name: GetSymbolLibraries()
methods.summary: Gets the names of the available symbol files in the current Tekla Structures environment, in the "symbols" directory, without the suffix.

returns.doc: A list of symbol file names or null if failed.

methods.name: GetSymbolLibraries(Boolean)
methods.summary: Gets the names of the available symbol files in the current Tekla Structures environment, in the "symbols" directory, without the suffix.

params.name: forceRefresh
params.doc: If set to true, always lists the files again (slower).

returns.doc: A list of symbol file names or null if failed.
